charter: Negative validation and malformed parameter testing

defectCandidates.title: Empty required faker params expose internal JavaScript exception text
defectCandidates.data: Column BadParam, faker helpers.arrayElement, empty params
defectCandidates.observed: Row 1: invalid faker params - Invalid Faker API Call Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length')
defectCandidates.expected: User-facing message that the required array params are missing/invalid.

defectCandidates.title: Text schema unknown() is accepted as generated data
defectCandidates.observed: Grid generated one row with value unknown.
defectCandidates.expected: Either reject unknown method-like calls or document that unknown() is normalized to literal text.

defectCandidates.title: Text-mode invalid schemas lack detailed visible error text
defectCandidates.observed: Generic Schema validation failed. Grid unchanged. No visible line-specific detail.
defectCandidates.expected: Detailed row/line-specific error comparable to row mode.

defectCandidates.title: Domain and faker top-level help lack params/examples
defectCandidates.data: source type help for domain and faker
defectCandidates.observed: Domain/faker help only shows a short description and Learn more.
defectCandidates.expected: Help pattern should match enum/literal/regex with schema params and examples, or clearly route users to picker details.

defectCandidates.title: Malformed params error echoes incomplete example/input
defectCandidates.observed: Row 1: params should be wrapped in parentheses, e.g. (["A","B").
defectCandidates.expected: Stable example that is syntactically complete and not confused with the bad input.

passedChecks: Method picker opens from app.html and shows navigator, tabs, search, list, help detail, parameter tables, usage examples, and Apply/Cancel.
Valid helpers.arrayElement params recover after prior empty/malformed params and generate a row.
Row-mode empty enum, invalid regex, missing domain command, and missing faker command are blocked with visible row validation.
Simple enum, quoted-comma enum, and empty literal all generated successfully with longer waits.
Constraint unknown source/target columns and missing ENDIF are blocked with line-specific validation.
Valid constraint recovers and generates one constrained row.
followUpIdeas: Add regression for helpers.arrayElement empty params with no raw JS exception text.
Test every faker helper with required params blank.
Test every domain command with required/optional params blank and malformed.
Clarify parser behavior for unknown vs unknown() in text schema.
Improve text-mode validation detail parity with row mode.
Add params tests for nested arrays, nested objects, escaped quotes, closing parentheses inside strings, and trailing commas.
Add validation coverage for malformed error examples.
Test enum values containing commas, quotes, and parentheses through row and text modes.
Assert Generate always clears aria-busy and disabled after validation failures.
Test constraints with escaped quotes, comma-containing enum values, multiple IF blocks, and semicolon-separated constraints.
Test in-place recovery after bad text-mode schema without reload.
Test keyboard-only method picker negative flows.
Compare app.html and generator.html with identical malformed schemas.
